name: NOX
subtitle: A standalone WHOOP app — your strap, your device, fully offline.
description:
An AltStore / SideStore source for NOX (a personal fork of NOOP, the independent open-source WHOOP companion). Add this source to get one-tap updates for the sideloaded iOS build.

NOX is not affiliated with WHOOP. It reads a strap you own, directly over Bluetooth, on your own device — no WHOOP app, no subscription, no cloud.

apps.name: NOX
apps.developerName: Josemihumanes (personal fork of NOOP by NoopApp)
apps.subtitle: Read your own WHOOP strap, fully offline.
apps.localizedDescription:
NOX talks to a WHOOP 4.0 / 5.0 / MG strap you own directly over Bluetooth — no WHOOP app, no subscription, no cloud. Live heart rate, history sync, and Charge / Effort / Rest scores, all computed on-device and stored only on your iPhone.

Independent and experimental; not affiliated with WHOOP. Personal fork based on NOOP by NoopApp: https://github.com/Josemihumanes/NOX_JMH

versions.localizedDescription: Diagnostico widget: si muestra -1 en todo, el App Group no es alcanzable desde la extension.

privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: NOX connects directly to your WHOOP strap over Bluetooth to read heart rate, R-R intervals, battery, and sensor data locally on your iPhone. Nothing leaves your device.
privacy.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: NOX reads your own Apple Health data on-device to compute recovery, strain, and sleep. Nothing leaves your device.
privacy.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: NOX writes the metrics it computes from your strap back into Apple Health, on-device and only when you allow it.

apps.versionDescription: Diagnostico widget: si muestra -1 en todo, el App Group no es alcanzable desde la extension.
